login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to Woof ID
login.resetSuccess: Your password has been updated. You can log in now.

register.title: Create account
register.intro: One account for Woof ID and doggybeachhouse.com — log in on both with the same details.
register.emailInUseWoofId: This email address is already registered with Woof ID.

forgotPassword.title: Login help
forgotPassword.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to get back into your Woof ID account.
forgotPassword.staffLinkHint: Share this link with the customer if email isn't set up yet.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

guest.headline: Your dog, front and centre.
guest.description: Create a Woof ID, check in at the store, earn Woof Coins and unlock rewards — linked to your Woof Wallet.
guest.checkInHint: Checking in? Scan the QR code in the store after logging in.
guest.disclaimer: No medical data. Just good times for dogs and their humans.

loggedIn.headline: Ready for a woofin' visit?
loggedIn.description: Pick a dog to view their profile, receipt or rewards.

new.title: New dog profile
new.walletHint: The number on your physical Woof Wallet. You can add this later too.

detail.balanceHintPrefix: Your balance on the website will appear once the till is connected. Until then, check your balance in store or at
detail.balanceHint: Your balance on the website will appear once the till is connected. Until then, check your balance in store or at {link}.
detail.balanceError: Could not fetch your balance right now. Please try again later.
detail.noWalletLinked: No Woof Wallet linked yet. Add your card or tag number under Edit profile.
detail.checkInHint: Check in via the QR code in the store.
detail.achievementsEmpty: No badges yet — check in or scan a receipt!
detail.favoriteProductsEmpty: No favourite products yet — scan a receipt!
detail.timelineEmpty: No events yet — time for a visit!
detail.balanceError: Could not load balance. Please try again later.

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.walletHint: The number on your physical Woof Wallet card or tag.

journey.title: Timeline
journey.empty: No events yet — time for a visit!

page.title: Check-in
page.alreadyCheckedInBody: All your dogs have already received check-in coins today. See you tomorrow!
page.maxPerDay: Maximum 1 check-in per dog per day.

scanner.title: Check-in
scanner.instructions: Scan the QR code on the screen at the till in Doggy Beach House to check in and earn Woof Coins.
scanner.instructionsBold: QR code on the screen at the till
scanner.instructionsSuffix: in Doggy Beach House to check in and earn Woof Coins.
scanner.expiredQr: This QR code has expired or is invalid. Scan the current code in the store — it refreshes every 15 minutes.
scanner.scanning: Point the camera at the QR code on the iPad screen
scanner.unsupportedHint: In-app QR scanning works best in Safari or Chrome. No luck? Open the Camera app on your iPhone, scan the QR, and tap the link.
scanner.footerHint: Only the QR on the store screen works. Max. 1× per dog per day. If the in-app scanner fails, scan with your iPhone Camera app.

display.title: Scan to check in
display.instructions: Open Woof ID on your phone and scan this code at the till.
display.loadTimeout: Loading the QR is taking too long. Check your Wi‑Fi and try again.
display.footerHint: This code changes every 15 minutes. Photos of old codes won't work. Maximum 1 check-in per dog per day.
display.voucherScanHint: Hold the QR code on your phone in front of the camera.
display.voucherAlreadyRedeemedBody: {rewardTitle} for {dogName} — this voucher has already been used.
display.voucherErrorNotFound: Voucher not recognized. Please try again.

scan.title: Scan receipt
scan.description: Scan the barcode at the bottom of your receipt. Products come automatically from the till — no typing needed. Woof Coins = purchase amount rounded to whole euros.
scan.descriptionBoldBarcode: barcode at the bottom of your receipt
scan.descriptionBoldCoins: purchase amount rounded to whole euros
scan.manualFallbackPending: POS link not active yet? Add products manually now and earn Woof Coins right away.

manual.title: Register receipt manually
manual.description: Search products from the store catalog and confirm your purchase. Woof Coins = total amount rounded to whole euros — credited immediately after confirmation.

barcodeForm.dogLabel: Which dog is this receipt for?
barcodeForm.barcodeLabel: Barcode on receipt (if camera doesn't work)
barcodeForm.barcodePlaceholder: Scan or type the code at the bottom of the receipt
barcodeForm.mplusPending: Till integration is being activated. Your receipt will be saved; Woof Coins will follow once STN has connected the API.

scanner.cameraHint: Point the camera at the barcode at the bottom of your receipt
scanner.holdSteady: Hold steady on the QR code
scanner.alignBarcodeBottom: Align the barcode at the bottom of your receipt in the frame
scanner.unsupportedHint: Barcode scanning via camera works best in Chrome. Otherwise use the input field below.

photoForm.dogLabel: Which dog is this receipt for?
photoForm.photoHint: Take a photo or choose from your gallery. Max 5 MB.
photoForm.processingHint: Just a moment — products are being recognised…

manualForm.totalMissingPrices: Total unknown — prices missing from catalog.

review.title: Does this look right?
review.resumed: Welcome back — your receipt is still here.
review.introMplus: We found these products from the till. Check the total and confirm to earn Woof Coins.
review.alreadyConfirmed: This receipt has already been confirmed.
review.intro: We found these products. Does this look right? Adjust names and quantities and check the total on your receipt.
review.purchaseTotalHint: Woof Coins = this amount rounded to whole euros (€16.23 → 16 coins, €16.80 → 17 coins).

pending.title: Receipt registered
pending.resumed: Welcome back — your receipt is still being processed.
pending.notFoundHint: We couldn't find this receipt in the till yet. It will be linked automatically once the till integration is live.
pending.activationHint: The till integration is being activated. Once it's live, your products and Woof Coins will be awarded automatically. Nothing else to do.

page.title: Redeem rewards
page.description: Collect coins with check-ins and receipts. Redeem them for a personal voucher.
page.howItWorks1: Earn coins with check-ins, receipts and badges.
page.howItWorks3: You'll get a personal voucher with a QR code and barcode.
page.howItWorks4: Scan your voucher at the till on the voucher screen — each code works only once.
page.howItWorks5: Active vouchers appear above — scan them at the till before you leave.

free-licky.title: Free Licky
free-licky.description: One free Licky ice cream for your dog — a tasty treat!
free-licky.terms: One per dog. Cannot be combined with other offers.

free-ball.title: Free ball
free-ball.description: A ball of your choice from our range, completely free.
free-ball.terms: One per dog. Cannot be combined with other offers.

discount-10.title: 10% off
discount-10.terms: Minimum spend €20. Cannot be combined with other offers.

snack-bag.title: Bag of snacks
snack-bag.description: A bag of free snacks from our snack bar — you choose, up to €15 value.
snack-bag.terms: Maximum €15 worth of snacks of your choice.

redeem.showAtCheckout: Show this voucher at the till. Once scanned, it's used up.
redeem.scanAtCounter: Scan this QR code at the till on the voucher screen.
redeem.scanAtKassa: Scan this voucher at the till on the voucher screen.

topUp.noWalletBody: First link a Woof Wallet barcode to a dog profile.
topUp.title: Top up
topUp.description: Pay securely via iDEAL on doggybeachhouse.com. Your balance will be activated in store.
topUp.loggedInAs: Logged in as {email} — same account as on doggybeachhouse.com.
topUp.successBody: Your top-up has been received. Your balance will be activated within a few hours during opening times.
topUp.successEmailNote: You'll receive an email during opening times once your Woof Wallet has been updated.
topUp.returnLinkInvalid: This return link is invalid or has expired.
topUp.returnLoginFailed: Automatic sign-in failed. Please log in manually to continue.
topUp.returnLinkHelp: Open Woof ID again or log in with the same account you use on doggybeachhouse.com.

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your login details or get help if you've forgotten your password.

wallet.title: Woof Wallet
wallet.description: Top up your physical Woof Wallet via iDEAL. Choose the dog your wallet is linked to.
wallet.linkFirst: Link a wallet to a dog first

home.title: Admin
home.qrTabletDescription: Set up a tablet at the till on the QR screen. Customers scan the code to check in; on the same screen they can also scan their voucher. The code refreshes every 15 minutes.

receipts.title: Receipt debug
receipts.description: Look up receipts by barcode to troubleshoot till integration.
receipts.empty: No receipts found for this barcode.

topUps.title: Register top-up
topUps.description: Track manually after activation at the till (no live POS connection).

users.title: Account help
users.description: Send a reset or login email to customers who've lost their password or email.
users.emailSentHint: The customer receives a link valid for 1 hour. The link is not shown in the admin panel.

errors.smtpNotConfigured: Email is not configured. Set up Gmail/SMTP in the server environment.
errors.emailSendFailed: Failed to send email. Check the SMTP settings.

vouchers.title: Scan vouchers
vouchers.description: Scan the barcode or enter the code to redeem a reward.

errors.alreadyRedeemed: This voucher has already been redeemed

voucherDisplay.title: Redeem voucher
voucherDisplay.instructions: Customer: tap Scan voucher and hold your QR code in front of the camera. Each voucher works only once.
voucherDisplay.scanningHint: Hold the QR code or barcode on your screen in front of the camera.
voucherDisplay.alreadyRedeemedBody: This voucher has already been used and cannot be scanned again.
voucherDisplay.footerHint: All vouchers appear in the admin system as soon as a customer redeems Woof Coins.

errors.title: Scan failed
errors.notFound: Voucher not recognized. Please try again.

meta.title: Woof ID | Doggy Beach House
meta.description: Dog profiles, check-ins, Woof Coins and rewards

login.sessionFailed: Login succeeded but the session is not active. Try again or refresh the page.
login.staffRequired: This account does not have admin access. Log in with a staff account (e.g. indykroos@hotmail.com).

register.emailInUseWoofId: This email address is already registered with Woof ID.

magicLogin.invalidOrExpired: Login link is invalid or has expired.
magicLogin.failed: Login failed. Request a new link.

checkIn.invalidQr: This isn't the store's check-in QR. Scan the code at the till.
checkIn.expiredQr: This QR code has expired or is invalid. Scan the current code in the store.
checkIn.alreadyCheckedInToday: {dogName} has already checked in today. See you tomorrow!
checkIn.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable. Allow access in your browser or scan the QR with your camera app and open the link.
checkIn.barcodeDetectorUnsupported: QR scanning works best in Chrome on your phone. You can also scan the QR with your regular camera app.

receipts.selectDogAndPhoto: Choose a dog and a photo of your receipt
receipts.selectDogAndBarcode: Choose a dog and scan a barcode
receipts.addNamedProduct: Add at least one product with a name
receipts.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable. Enter the barcode manually below.
receipts.duplicateBarcode: This receipt has already been registered
receipts.duplicateBarcodeOtherDog: This barcode was already used for another dog's receipt.
receipts.alreadyClaimed: This receipt has already been claimed
receipts.alreadyClaimedCoins: Woof Coins were already awarded ({count} coins).
receipts.dailyLimit: You've reached the daily receipt limit. Try again tomorrow.

wallet.topUpFailed: Top-up failed. Please try again later.
wallet.barcodeNotFound: No Woof Wallet found for this barcode.
wallet.noWebshopAccount: Your webshop account could not be found. Contact Doggy Beach House.
wallet.barcodeMismatch: This barcode does not match your webshop account.
wallet.noBarcode: Link your Woof Wallet barcode first.
wallet.noProduct: Top-up is not configured in the webshop yet.
wallet.noCart: Could not load the cart. Please try again.
wallet.cartAddFailed: Could not add the top-up product. Please try again.
wallet.pluginMissing: Woof Wallet is not active on the webshop. Please contact Doggy Beach House.
wallet.woocommerceMissing: WooCommerce is not available on the webshop. Please contact Doggy Beach House.
wallet.restNoRoute: Top-up is not available on the webshop. Check that Woof Wallet and Woof ID Bridge are active.
wallet.networkError: Could not reach the webshop. Please try again later.
wallet.notConfigured: Woof Wallet connection is not configured yet.
wallet.authFailed: Webshop connection was rejected. Please contact Doggy Beach House.
wallet.noCheckoutUrl: No payment link was received from the webshop.
wallet.remoteCheckoutMissing: Topping up via the app requires an update of the Woof Wallet plugin on doggybeachhouse.com. Please contact Doggy Beach House.
wallet.webshopServerError: The webshop returned a technical error during top-up. The Woof Wallet plugin probably needs to be updated — please contact Doggy Beach House.

account.emailInUse: This email address is already in use
account.emailUpdated: Email updated on Woof ID and doggybeachhouse.com. Please log in again.

registerApi.emailInUseWoofId: This email is already registered with Woof ID. Log in instead of registering again.
registerApi.emailInUseWebshop: This email is already used on doggybeachhouse.com. Use the same password to link your accounts.
registerApi.createFailed: Could not create account. Please try again or contact Doggy Beach House.

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Get news and updates from Doggy Beach House directly on your phone.
push.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.iosHint: On iPhone/iPad, push only works when Woof ID is added to your home screen (Share → Add to Home Screen). Then open the app again.
push.denied: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser or device settings.
push.subscribed: You receive push notifications from Woof ID.

admin.title: Send push notifications
admin.description: Send a notification to all users who enabled push.
admin.iosHint: iOS: push only works for users who added Woof ID as a PWA to their home screen.

errors.vapid_not_configured: VAPID keys are missing in server configuration.

guide.title: Doggy Guide

hint.pan: Pinch to zoom · drag to pan

guide.mapAlt: Interactive map with off-leash areas around Zandvoort

intro.title: Discover off-leash spots
intro.body: Tap a hotspot for route info, tips and links. The map is based on the official Doggy Beach House guide.

popup.dbhCta: Check in at Doggy Beach House

hunt.title: Scavenger hunt
hunt.subtitle: Off-leash area Zuid
hunt.uploadPrompt: You're close enough! Take a photo with your dog to unlock the next clue.
hunt.walkCloser: Get within {radius} m of the checkpoint to unlock photo upload.

testMode.banner: Test mode — no GPS, no Woof Coins, not on the leaderboard. Staff only.
testMode.completeNote: This was a test run — nothing was saved and no coins were awarded.

compass.permissionDenied: Compass access denied — showing map direction only. Enable motion & orientation in your browser settings.
compass.unsupported: Compass not available — arrow shows map direction.
compass.calibrating: Calibrating compass… move your phone in a figure-eight.
compass.live: Live compass — walk in the direction the arrow points.
compass.bearingOnly: Map direction — rotate until the arrow points ahead.

collage.shareText: I completed the Woof ID scavenger hunt!
collage.previewAlt: Adventure collage with route map and checkpoint photos
collage.error: Could not create the collage. Please try again.

homeCta.title: GPS scavenger hunt — Zuid
homeCta.body: Walk your dog through off-leash area Zuid. Reach GPS checkpoints, take photos, and earn Woof Coins.

intro.body: Choose your route before you start. You can change it again at Swan Lake if you change your mind.

route.changePrompt: Before you continue — include the viewpoint climb or take the shorter route?

full.title: Full route with viewpoint
full.description: Climb the highest dune for a panoramic view over the Water Supply Dunes.

short.title: Shorter route
short.description: Skip the steep climb to the highest hill and head straight to the deer valley.

errors.locked: You can no longer change the route at this point.
errors.generic: Could not save route choice. Please try again.

geo.denied: Location access is required for the scavenger hunt. Enable GPS in your browser settings.
geo.unsupported: Your browser does not support GPS.
geo.unavailable: Could not determine your location. Try again outdoors with GPS enabled.

hints.freeUsed: Your free hint has been used for this hunt.
hints.paymentPending: Payment is still processing. Please wait…

errors.generic: Could not load the hint. Please try again.
errors.purchase: Could not start hint purchase. Please try again.

errors.tooFar: You're not close enough to this checkpoint yet.
errors.gpsAccuracy: GPS signal is too inaccurate. Wait a moment or move to an open area.
errors.wrongCheckpoint: This checkpoint is already done or not available yet.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

completed.title: Hunt complete!
completed.body: Well done — you and your dog reached every checkpoint. You earned 50 Woof Coins!

replay.note: Free replay — your previous completion stays in history. Paid replay may be added later.

leaderboard.title: Fastest walkers
leaderboard.empty: No completions yet — be the first!

hunts.title: Scavenger hunts
hunts.subtitle: GPS walks with your dog — earn Woof Coins along the way.

history.title: Hunt history
history.subtitle: Completed scavenger hunts with your dogs.

first_visit.name: First visit
first_visit.description: First visit to Doggy Beach House
